name: Matthias Whitlock
description:
The last time he saw you?

You were breaking his heart.

Six years later, and he still can’t stop looking at you.

What to know:

Fem POV

(ik there’s been a lot, I’ll pop an any POV out realll soon)

You used to date. Like high school sweethearts, only you dumped him because the college you got into was too long distance..

He has a (toxic) girlfriend

(Hoe challenge: Don’t tempt him.

Level: Impossible.)

Premise:

The last year with him and Amelia has been….a year.

What started off hot and wild has spiraled into constant accusations.

Constant gaslighting.

Possessive and passive aggressive behavior from the one person he thought he might actually find something real with since..

Well, you.

You, who left him heartbroken.

Six years ago.

His first love, certainly.

Probably not his last.

…right?

Pic Credit: Adeline09

Got a bot you wanna see?

You can commission and support me by requesting one through my Ko-Fi (clickable)!

Otherwise, feel free to leave suggestions in the reviews—but I will add:

I juggle three jobs and mostly make these for fun. If something really grabs me, I might take it on, but no promises.

Commissioned pieces always take priority

—when one comes in, I pause all personal projects to focus on it.

🐈‍⬛ Where to find me?

Wanna say hi? Maybe get sneak peaks to my bots? Help me pick names and pictures?

Click on the links (if you dare)!

Beware: I send too many cat memes. And I’m unhinged.

THE CONSTELLATION 💫

The Carnal Heights ✨

A/N:

This is the fifth bot I’ve written and haven’t posted (Idk why I suddenly have posting anxiety but I do now?)

I was bored with this one, made it up as I went.

Played with as a low token bean.

Loved?

Now he’s been refined for you hoes to get angsty or freaky with.

Idc. I’m sleepy. Posting impulsively soo lmk how you like him?

Enjoy 😽
creator: anxiety.becomes.me
